mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Žaborić to Roški Slap?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 115 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, luggage included. A return trip is 230.
At your exact address in Žaborić, whether a home, hotel or apartment. Send the address when you book and I will confirm the meeting point.
